discoveryReport.businessIdentity: Roofing & Restoration is a local roofing and exterior surface restoration business represented by Greg. Verified source material lists roofing-related services plus driveway, patio, external living, retaining wall, and pressure cleaning work.
discoveryReport.currentPresence: No verified website, email address, street address, service area, licence details, Google rating, or review evidence is available from the supplied lead fixture.
discoveryReport.opportunityDiagnosis: The business appears to rely on offline visibility and direct phone contact. A focused one-page preview can improve credibility, explain the service range, and make the inspection-and-quote path clearer without adding unverified claims.
discoveryReport.recommendedAngle: Position Roofing & Restoration around experienced, practical roof and exterior restoration help, with a direct call-to-book flow for in-person inspections and quotes.
evidenceUsed: Verified services from source: roof restorations, capping, respray, repairs, gutters, driveway, patio, external living, retaining wall, pressure cleaning
Claim from source: free in person inspection and quote
Research note: source was operator image and text, not a verified website
Research note: no website, email, address, licence, Google rating, or real review evidence available

gapScore.rationale: The business has a verified name, phone number, service list, experience claim, and quote offer, which are useful conversion anchors. The main gaps are absence of a verified website, email, address, service area, reviews, project photos, licence details, and structured local SEO signals.

websiteProductionSpec.templateDirection: Trade-services one-page preview with a direct phone-first conversion path, practical service sections, inspection-and-quote messaging, and restrained trust-building based only on supplied facts.

blockPlan.purpose: Introduce Roofing & Restoration, explain the main service category, and make phone contact immediate.
blockPlan.contentType: verified business name, generated service positioning, verified phone CTA

blockPlan.purpose: Group the supplied services into clear categories so visitors can quickly identify relevant work.
blockPlan.contentType: verified service list with generated explanatory copy

blockPlan.purpose: Highlight the supplied free in-person inspection and quote claim.
blockPlan.contentType: source claim with generated process copy

blockPlan.purpose: Use the supplied 40 years experience claim as a credibility point without adding unsupported proof.
blockPlan.contentType: source claim with conservative supporting copy

blockPlan.purpose: Explain a simple enquiry, inspection, quote, and work scheduling flow.
Answer likely customer questions while avoiding pricing, warranty, licence, or location claims.
Repeat the phone contact path and inspection quote offer.

assetPlan.sourceRequirement: Use supplied operator image if available; otherwise use neutral trade-style demo imagery without implying it is a completed project by the business.
Use generic licensed visual support only if no real business photos are provided.
Do not include real before-and-after claims unless project photos are supplied and approved.

contactPlan.contactForm: Optional preview form may be shown as a website interaction pattern, but it must not imply a verified email destination.

seoPlan.title: Roofing & Restoration | Roof Restorations, Repairs & Exterior Cleaning
seoPlan.metaDescription: Call Roofing & Restoration on 0424 371 622 for roof restorations, capping, resprays, repairs, gutters, pressure cleaning and exterior restoration enquiries.
localSeoNotes: Do not add suburb, city, or service area until verified.
Do not create address schema without a verified address.
Use service keywords from the verified service list.
Use phone number exactly as supplied.

mustKeep: Services: roof restorations, capping, respray, repairs, gutters, driveway, patio, external living, retaining wall, pressure cleaning
Claim from source: free in person inspection and quote

copyBrief.heroSubcopy: Roof restorations, capping, resprays, repairs, gutters, pressure cleaning and exterior restoration work handled with decades of trade experience.

serviceCopy.copy: Refresh tired roofing with restoration work designed to improve appearance, condition, and long-term presentation.
Practical roofing support for capping, respray work, and repairs where an in-person inspection can confirm the right approach.
Gutter-related work can be assessed as part of the broader roof and exterior inspection.
Exterior surfaces around the home can be reviewed for cleaning, restoration, and presentation improvements.
Pressure cleaning and related exterior work can help restore the look of hard surfaces and outdoor areas.

faq.question: How do I get a quote?
faq.answer: Call Greg on 0424 371 622 to arrange a free in-person inspection and quote.

faq.question: What types of work does Roofing & Restoration handle?
faq.answer: Services listed include roof restorations, capping, respray, repairs, gutters, driveway, patio, external living, retaining wall, and pressure cleaning work.

faq.question: Can the work be quoted without seeing the property?
faq.answer: The supplied information promotes an in-person inspection and quote, so the preview page should guide visitors to call and arrange a site visit.

faq.question: Does the business list an email address?
faq.answer: No verified email address is available, so the preview should use phone contact only.

copyBrief.outreachHook: I put together a phone-first website preview for Roofing & Restoration that turns the sign details into a clear service page, keeps Greg's number prominent, and avoids adding any unverified claims.

riskNotes: Source is operator image and text, not a verified website or official business profile.
No verified email, address, website URL, service area, licence, rating, reviews, pricing, or guarantee details are available.
The 40 years experience and free in-person inspection and quote claims come from the supplied source and should remain phrased conservatively.
Do not imply generic imagery shows this business's completed work unless the assets are supplied and confirmed.
Customer-facing copy should not mention internal evidence status or content generation.
